summary: Redis connection pool exhausted in payment-api after deployment v2.3.1
root_cause: The max pool size of 100 was insufficient for the increased traffic pattern introduced by deployment v2.3.1, causing connection timeouts and cascading failures in checkout and payment services.

hypotheses.description: Connection pool too small for new traffic pattern
Redis server slow response causing pool starvation

immediate: Increase redis pool max to 200 in payment-api config
Enable circuit breaker for non-critical redis calls
fix: Implement dynamic pool sizing based on traffic
Add redis connection pool monitoring and alerting
prevention: Add load testing before deployment with 2x traffic projection
Implement pool utilization metrics as deployment gate

uncertainties: Whether redis server latency also contributed to pool exhaustion
